overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character moves from a shadowed area under a massive concrete overpass into a sunlit open area with ascending ramps, passing pedestrians and cyberpunk architecture with neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway under massive concrete overpass

events.description: approaching the exit of the overpass, bright daylight becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the concrete overpass toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling and walls of the overpass creating a tunnel-like effect
futuristic high-rise buildings with neon advertisements visible in the distance
paved road with red and white markings running under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a shadowed corridor under a massive concrete overpass. The environment is dimly lit with the bright exit visible ahead. The asphalt road stretches forward toward the distant cyberpunk city skyline with neon signs barely visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with ascending ramp

events.description: exits the covered overpass into bright sunlight and open space
begins ascending the inclined ramp leading upward

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined ramp from the underpass into the open city area, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking across the ramp path ahead of the player

entered.detail: steeply inclined asphalt road with red and white painted curbs leading upward
rusted metal pedestrian bridge structure crossing over the road
wooden stall with colorful umbrellas and goods displayed
tall skyscrapers covered in bright digital billboards and corporate logos

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shadows into bright sunlight, the scene opens into a wide urban area with a steep ramp leading upward. The player ascends the ramp while pedestrians cross the path. Colorful street vendor stalls line the left side while massive cyberpunk towers with neon advertisements dominate the skyline ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending roadway with overpass structure on right

events.description: continuing steep ascent up the ramp, approaching the overpass structure
large concrete overpass support structure temporarily blocks view of skyline on right

agents.ego_description: continuing up the steep ramp, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: walking down the ramp in the opposite direction wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: massive angled concrete pillars supporting the overpass above
orange and black cyberpunk-style car parked along the curb
black metal safety railing along the left edge of the ramp

segments.scene_description: The player continues ascending the steep ramp as the concrete overpass structure looms on the right. Pedestrians walk down the ramp in the opposite direction. A futuristic orange vehicle is parked on the right while the metal railing guides the path on the left. The elevated walkway bridge moves closer as the ascent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under overpass with homeless encampment

events.description: passing under the overpass support structure into a partially covered pedestrian area
homeless encampment with sleeping bags and trash becomes visible under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking past the overpass support structure and homeless encampment area on the right

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk near the encampment area

entered.detail: makeshift shelter with sleeping bags, cardboard, and trash bags under the overpass
rusted metal railway structure with support beams running parallel to the path
tall cylindrical building with large green digital display showing the number 02

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the top of the ramp and enters a partially covered sidewalk area beneath the overpass. A homeless encampment with sleeping bags and debris is visible on the right under the concrete structure. To the left, elevated train tracks run parallel to the path while a distinctive green digital tower rises in the distance. The ground transitions from asphalt to concrete sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dim, shadowed underpass into a bright, sprawling cyberpunk cityscape. It begins in a dimly lit corridor beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving along an asphalt road toward a distant skyline of neon signs. As the camera emerges from the shadows into brilliant sunlight, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza where the path ascends a steep ramp lined with colorful street vendor stalls and towering skyscrapers. The ascent continues past pedestrians and a parked orange vehicle, with the concrete structure of the overpass looming to the right before the camera reaches the top of the incline. Finally, the environment shifts back into a partially covered sidewalk area, passing a homeless encampment and elevated train tracks as a green digital tower rises in the distance.
